imageHints.suggestedSubject: single person, landscape, or abstract texture with a clear uncluttered area at the bottom
imageHints.treatment: gradient darkens the bottom 35% to 80% opacity for text legibility

useCases: Brand manifesto or mission statement posts
Launch hero posts with dramatic mood
Hiring or team posts with a lifestyle photo
Campaign anchor posts where the photo sets the emotional tone
avoidCases: Data-heavy content requiring multiple text elements
Posts needing bullet points or structured information
Brands without strong photography in the DAM
Photos with complex or text-heavy backgrounds
